source: EICAR Standard Anti-Virus Test File reference hashes only; this file intentionally does not store the generated 68-byte EICAR demo content.

signatures.name: EICAR Standard Anti-Virus Test File
signatures.notes: Official safe anti-malware test file reference. The Rust prepare-eicar-demo command generates the actual EICAR test file in the controlled demo tree; the generated literal file is not committed or exported.
